ud1.9:1.1:
Evaṁ me sutaṁ—​
ekaṁ samayaṁ bhagavā gayāyaṁ viharati gayāsīse. Tena kho pana samayena sambahulā jaṭilā sītāsu hemantikāsu rattīsu antaraṭṭhake himapātasamaye gayāyaṁ ummujjantipi nimujjantipi, ummujjanimujjampi karonti osiñcantipi, aggimpi juhanti:  "iminā suddhī"ti.
ud1.9:1.2: Addasā kho bhagavā te sambahule jaṭile sītāsu hemantikāsu rattīsu antaraṭṭhake himapātasamaye gayāyaṁ ummujjantepi nimujjantepi ummujjanimujjampi karonte osiñcantepi aggimpi juhante:  "iminā suddhī"ti.
ud1.9:1.3: Atha kho bhagavā etamatthaṁ viditvā tāyaṁ velāyaṁ imaṁ udānaṁ udānesi:
ud1.9:1.4:
"Na udakena sucī hoti,
bahvettha nhāyatī jano;
Yamhi saccañca dhammo ca,
so sucī so ca brāhmaṇo"ti.
Navamaṁ.
